Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1 ] | extend ni=int(null) | extend a=i+ni, b=i*ni, c=i-ni, d=ni/i | project i, ni, a, b, c, d
Sql: SELECT i, ni, a, b, c, d FROM (SELECT *, i + ni AS a, i * ni AS b, i - ni AS c, ni / i AS d FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS ni FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT), CAST(-5.5 AS DOUBLE)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.1 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, l, r)))

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | extend x=int(null) | where x > 0 | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(i)) WHERE x > 0

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | extend x=int(null) | where x <= 0 | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(i)) WHERE x <= 0

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | extend x=int(null) | where not(x > 0) | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(i)) WHERE NOT (x > 0)

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | extend x=int(null) | where x == x | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(i)) WHERE x = x

Kql: datatable(r:real)[ 1.0, 2.0, 3.0 ] | extend x=real(null) | summarize s=sum(x), a=avg(x), mn=min(x), mx=max(x), c=count(), cx=count(x)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COALESCE(AVG(x), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS a, MIN(x) AS mn, MAX(x) AS mx, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(*) AS cx FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS x FROM (VALUES (CAST(1.0 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2.0 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3.0 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(r))

Kql: datatable(r:real)[ 1.0, 2.0, 3.0 ] | extend x=iif(r>1.5, r, real(null)) | summarize s=sum(x), a=avg(x), mn=min(x), mx=max(x), cnt=count(), cntx=count(x)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COALESCE(AVG(x), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS a, MIN(x) AS mn, MAX(x) AS mx, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(*) AS cntx FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN r > 1.5 THEN r ELSE CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) END AS x FROM (VALUES (CAST(1.0 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2.0 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3.0 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(r))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "", "b" ] | extend e=isempty(s), ne=isnotempty(s), n=isnull(s), nn=isnotnull(s) | project s, e, ne, n, nn
Sql: SELECT s, e, ne, n, nn FROM (SELECT *, (s IS NULL OR CAST(s AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e, (s IS NOT NULL AND CAST(s AS VARCHAR) <> '') AS ne, (s IS NULL) AS n, (s IS NOT NULL) AS nn FROM (VALUES ('a'), (''), ('b')) AS t(s))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "" ] | union (datatable(s:string)[ "c" ] | extend s=tostring(dynamic(null))) | extend e=isempty(s), n=isnull(s) | project s, e, n
Sql: SELECT s, e, n FROM (SELECT *, (s IS NULL OR CAST(s AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e, (s IS NULL) AS n FROM ((SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('')) AS t(s)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS s FROM (VALUES ('c')) AS t(s))))

Kql: print a = isnull(int(null)), b = isnull(5), c = isnull(real(null)), d = isnull(""), e = isnull("x")
Sql: SELECT (CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) IS NULL) AS a, (5 IS NULL) AS b, (CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) IS NULL) AS c, ('' IS NULL) AS d, ('x' IS NULL) AS e

Kql: print a = iif(bool(null), "t", "f"), b = case(bool(null), "c1", true, "c2", "def")
Sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) THEN 't' ELSE 'f' END AS a, CASE WHEN CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'c1' WHEN TRUE THEN 'c2' ELSE 'def' END AS b

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 10, 15 ] | extend y=long(null) | order by y asc, x asc | project x, y
Sql: SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS y FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(15 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY y ASC NULLS FIRST, x ASC NULLS FIRST)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 10, 15 ] | extend y=iif(x==10, long(null), x) | order by y desc | project x, y
Sql: SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN x = 10 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE x END AS y FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(15 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY y DESC NULLS LAST)

Sql: SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN x = 10 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE x END AS y FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(15 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY y ASC NULLS FIRST)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 10, 15 ] | extend y=iif(x==10, long(null), x) | sort by y asc nulls first | project x, y
Sql: SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN x = 10 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE x END AS y FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(15 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY y DESC NULLS LAST)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 10, 15 ] | extend y=iif(x==10, long(null), x) | sort by y asc nulls last | project x, y

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ ] | extend y=x+1 | project x, y

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ ] | order by x asc | take 5

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ ] | summarize c=count() by x
Sql: SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (SELECT NULL AS x WHERE 1 = 0) GROUP BY ALL

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Hello", "", "World" ] | extend up=toupper(s), lo=tolower(s), rev=reverse(s), len=strlen(s) | project s, up, lo, rev, len
Sql: SELECT s, up, lo, rev, len FROM (SELECT *, UPPER(s) AS up, LOWER(s) AS lo, REVERSE(s) AS rev, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS len FROM (VALUES ('Hello'), (''), ('World')) AS t(s))

Sql: SELECT MAX(LENGTH(CAST(big AS VARCHAR))) AS ml FROM (SELECT *, REPEAT('z', 100) AS big FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x))

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | extend nv=iif(v==30, long(null), v) | summarize s=sum(nv), c=count(), cv=count(nv), dc=countif(isnotnull(nv)) by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(nv), 0) AS s, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(*) AS cv, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (nv IS NOT NULL)) AS dc FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN v = 30 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE v END AS nv FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic(null), dynamic({"a":1}), dynamic([]) ] | extend t=gettype(d), n=isnull(d), an=array_length(d) | project t, n, an
Sql: SELECT t, n, an FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(d) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE WHEN json_type(CAST(d AS VARCHAR)) = 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(d)) END AS t, (d IS NULL) AS n, LEN(d) AS an FROM (VALUES (NULL), ('{"a":1}'::JSON), (LIST_VALUE())) AS t(d))
